phrases.intent_en: Ask when the market is open
phrases.text_local: À quelles heures est ouvert le marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kelz UHR eh voo-VEHR leh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: The market is open Tuesday to Sunday, 6am to 1pm. It's closed on Mondays. The best time is early morning for fresh produce.

responses.english: Tuesday to Sunday, from 6 AM to 1 PM.
responses.phonetic: wee, may ruh-gar-DAY layz oh-REHR ah-fee-SHAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
responses.french: Du mardi au dimanche, de six heures à treize heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the best olive oil
phrases.text_local: Où trouver la meilleure huile d'olive ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo troo-VAY lah may-YUHR weel doh-LEEV
phrases.cultural_note: Provence produces some of France's best olive oils. Look for 'huile d'olive de Provence' with the AOC label.

responses.english: Look for the stalls with the AOC Provence label, over there.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.french: Cherchez les étals avec le label AOC Provence, par là.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a sample of pastis
phrases.text_local: Puis-je avoir un échantillon de pastis ?
phrases.pronunciation: pwee-zhuh ah-VWAR uhn ay-kahn-tee-YON duh pahs-TEEF
phrases.cultural_note: Many vendors offer samples. Pastis is an anise-flavored spirit — it's traditionally drunk as an apéritif with water.

responses.english: Yes, taste it. Here you go.
responses.phonetic: byan sewr, zhuh voo ah-PROHNT sah too deh SWEET

phrases.intent_en: Ask what kinds of products are sold here
phrases.cultural_note: The Marché des Capucins is one of Marseille's most diverse markets, specialising in African and North African spices, produce and fabric.

responses.english: Spices, vegetables and fabrics from around the world.
responses.phonetic: day zay-PEES, lay-GOOM ay tee-SOO doo mond ahn-TYAY.
responses.french: Des épices, légumes et tissus du monde entier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the market closes
phrases.text_local: Le marché ferme à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh mar-SHAY fairm ah kel UR

responses.phonetic: VAIR TREZ UR, doo MAR-dee oh sam-DEE.
responses.french: Vers treize heures, du mardi au samedi.
